_meta.description: Schema for a source-level record in the Oil Painting Research Assistant. One record per ingested source document. All enum values must match controlled_vocabulary.json.
_meta.chroma_note: Source records are not directly indexed in ChromaDB. The trust_tier, source_family, source_type, and citation_format fields are propagated to chunk-level ChromaDB metadata at indexing time.

source_id.description: Unique internal source ID. Assigned at intake. Never changed after assignment.

title.description: Full title of the source document.

short_title.description: Short, scan-friendly reference label used in citations and log entries.

source_family.description: Broad source class. Determines trust tier range.

source_type.description: More specific source type within the family.

institution_or_publisher.description: Organization or publisher responsible for the source.

author.description: Author name(s) if known. Use null if not identifiable; use institution name if corporate authorship.

publication_year.description: Year of publication as integer, or 'unknown' as string, or null if not determinable.

edition_or_version.description: Edition, version number, or snapshot label if applicable.

source_url.description: Original URL if applicable. Null if not a web source.

raw_file_name.description: Filename of the saved raw file in data/raw/.

raw_file_path.description: Full relative path to the raw file within data/raw/.

capture_method.description: Method used to capture the source.

trust_tier.description: Trust tier 1–5. Null until assigned by reviewer. Propagated to chunk-level ChromaDB metadata at indexing.

authority_score.description: 0–5 score for source authority and rigor. Null until assigned.

extractability_score.description: 0–5 score for how well content can be extracted and chunked. Null until assigned.

coverage_value_score.description: 0–5 score for breadth and depth of domain coverage. Null until assigned.

density_score.description: 0–5 score for information density. Null until assigned.

priority_score.description: Derived composite priority score used for ingestion prioritization. Null until all component scores are assigned.

domain.description: Primary knowledge domain of the source.

subdomain.description: More specific area within the domain. Free text.

materials_mentioned.description: Canonical material names mentioned in the source. Use material_alias_map.json canonical_name values.

pigment_codes.description: Pigment codes present in the source (e.g. PW1, PB29). Empty list if none.

historical_period.description: Historical period scope of the source.

artist_or_school.description: Artists or schools referenced. Empty list if not applicable.

question_types_supported.description: Question classes this source helps answer.

raw_captured.description: Whether the raw file has been saved to data/raw/.

normalized_text_created.description: Whether a clean normalized text version exists in data/clean/.

metadata_attached.description: Whether the source metadata record file exists.

qa_reviewed.description: Whether a human QA review has been performed.

chunked.description: Whether the source has been chunked.

indexed.description: Whether the source chunks have been indexed into retrieval stores.

ready_for_use.description: Whether the source is approved for live retrieval.

case_study_vs_general.description: Whether the source is primarily a case study or general reference.

claim_types_present.description: Types of claims present in the source.

confidence_level.description: Reviewer confidence in metadata completeness and accuracy.

duplicate_cluster_id.description: ID of the duplicate cluster this source belongs to, if any.

superseded_by.description: Source ID of the record that supersedes this one, if applicable.

limitations_notes.description: Known limitations, scope boundaries, or weaknesses of this source.

license_or_usage_notes.description: Usage constraints: internal summary only, full quotation permitted, etc.

citation_format.description: Preferred short citation text for use in answers. Propagated to chunk-level ChromaDB metadata at indexing.

summary.description: 2–4 sentence functional summary: what the source covers and when to use it.

retrieval_notes.description: Guidance for when and how to use this source in retrieval.

internal_notes.description: Project-specific operational notes not intended for citation.
